name: Denver Zoo
notes: Youth cardholders ages 5-18 free + one accompanying adult. Year-round, unlimited visits. Online timed reservations required. Children 2 and under always free (no card needed).

name: Denver Museum of Nature & Science
notes: Free for My Denver Card cardholder (school-age children) only. Adults not included. Current window: June 1 - Aug 31, 2026. Children under 3 always free (no card needed).

name: Denver Botanic Gardens
notes: Unlimited visits Jan-Mar. Ages 5-15: free + one accompanying adult. Ages 16-18: free, no adult included. Valid K-12 only. Not valid for special events. Children 2 and under always free (no card needed).

name: Clyfford Still Museum
notes: Youth 17 and under free. One accompanying adult free on all weekends and during winter, spring, and summer school breaks. Use code MyDenverCard at online checkout or show ID at the door.

name: Denver Art Museum
notes: Free for all kids under 18 year-round. No myDenverCard required.

name: History Colorado Center
notes: Free for children year-round. No myDenverCard required. Adults pay regular admission.

name: MCA Denver
notes: Teens and children always free (no card needed). My Denver Card holders also get two free adults per child year-round.

name: Molly Brown House Museum
notes: Children with My Denver Card free. Adults pay full price. Valid Friday-Sunday year-round, plus every day during spring, winter, and summer school breaks. Children 5 and under always free (no card needed).

name: Museo de las Americas
notes: Free for children 13 and under year-round. No myDenverCard required. Adults pay regular admission.

name: Downtown Denver Rink
closure_reason: Closed for 2025-2026 season due to Skyline Park reconstruction. Expected to reopen when construction is complete.

name: Washington Park Rec Center Pool
notes: Free with My Denver Card. Year-round indoor pool. Cardholder ages 5-18. Children 0-1 always free. Call ahead to confirm pool schedule.

name: Carla Madison Rec Center Pool
notes: Free with My Denver Card. Year-round indoor leisure pool with water slide, rock climbing wall over water, and lazy river. Cardholder ages 5-18. Children 0-1 always free. Call ahead to confirm pool schedule.

name: Central Park Rec Center Pool
notes: Free with My Denver Card. Outdoor leisure pool with lazy river, slides, and splash area. Cardholder ages 5-18. Children 0-1 always free. Call ahead to confirm pool schedule.
address: 9651 E Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Denver, CO 80238

name: Ashland Rec Center Pool
notes: Free with My Denver Card. Year-round indoor leisure pool. Cardholder ages 5-18. Children 0-1 always free. Both pools close 4:15-4:30 PM daily for a break. Pool closes at 4:15 PM on the 2nd and 4th Friday of each month.

pools.notes: Closes 4:15-4:30pm daily for cleaning. On 2nd and 4th Fridays, pool closes at 4:15pm.
